title: Amtech S3965 150mm (6") Wall brush
features: VERSATILE: 150mm (6") wall brush can be used with interior and exterior paints, emulsion, stains and varnishes and is ideal for smooth, rough or textured surfaces; it can also be used as a splash brush
EASY TO USE: It has a comfortable, shaped wooden handle
HANGING HOLE: The brush has a convenient hanging hole for storage
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for home, office, or workshop settings
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and tool products come with a twelve month guarantee and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY Jobs expected. The range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. Am Tech also offer a range of power tools that offers a reliable level of service and also looks the part for a present of gift in colour boxes and double blister displays. Am-Tech also offers a range of innovatively designed security products ranging from Dummy cameras to siren sounding locks. Am-Tech produce their products from the best materials possible and at the best cost to ensure you are getting a real value for money offering.
